CLASSIC_CUSTOM_CARDS.title: Classic Character Cards
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_CARDS.description: Use Slay the Spire 1 card pools for your selected character.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_RELICS.title: Classic Relics
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_RELICS.description: Use Slay the Spire 1 relic pools for your selected character.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_HYBRID.title: Hybrid Character Cards
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_HYBRID.description: Merge STS1 and STS2 card/relic pools. Mutually exclusive with Classic Cards.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_HYBRID_DEDUPE.title: Dedupe Overlaps
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_HYBRID_DEDUPE.description: Hybrid only: remove same-name overlaps so STS2 versions win.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS.title: Classic Colorless
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS.description: Use STS1 colorless cards as the colorless pool.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_HYBRID.title: Hybrid Colorless
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_HYBRID.descript: Merge STS1 and STS2 colorless pools. Mutually exclusive with Classic Colorless.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_DEDUPE.title: Colorless Dedupe
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_DEDUPE.descript: Hybrid Colorless only: remove same-name overlaps so STS2 versions win.
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_REWARDS.title: Colorless Card Rewards
CLASSIC_CUSTOM_COLORLESS_REWARDS.descrip: Colorless cards can appear in combat card rewards.
